title: ApothSB
description: Fixes Apotheosis gems being rejected by Sophisticated Backpacks tag filter slots.
body:
## ApothSB

ApothSB allows Apotheosis gems to be placed into Sophisticated Backpacks filter slots, fixing an incompatibility that prevented tag-based gem filtering.

### Features
- Apotheosis gems can now be placed into the tag filter slot in filter, pickup, and magnet upgrades.
- Selecting the apotheosis:gem tag works correctly after placing a gem in the slot.
- Soft dependency, mod loads safely without either Apotheosis or Sophisticated Backpacks present.
- Lightweight, no gameplay changes, purely a compatibility fix.

### Requirements
Apotheosis 7.x (required).
Sophisticated Backpacks 3.x (required).
Sophisticated Core 1.x (required, installed automatically with Sophisticated Backpacks).
Minecraft 1.20.1.
Forge 47.x.

### Compatibility
Minecraft 1.20.1, Forge 47.x, Apotheosis 7.x, Sophisticated Backpacks 3.x.
